title: Use Cloud Storage
summary: Save files to cloud storage so they are accessible from another device.
learnerPromise: You will be able to upload a file to a cloud storage service and open it from a different device.
whyItMatters: Cloud storage keeps your files safe even if your device is lost or damaged. It also makes it easy to access your documents, photos, and other files from multiple devices.
realLifeUses: You need to work on a school document from both home and school computers
You want to share vacation photos with family without sending them one by one
Your phone is running out of space and you want to keep your photos safe
You wrote notes on your laptop and want to read them on your phone later
materialsNeeded: A phone, tablet, or computer with internet access
A free cloud storage account (such as Google Drive, iCloud, OneDrive, or Dropbox)
result: A file uploaded to cloud storage that you can view and download from another device or browser.
youWillLearn: How to create or sign into a cloud storage account
How to upload a file from your device to the cloud
How to access your file from a web browser or another device
How to organize files into folders within cloud storage
miniChallenge: Upload a photo or document to a cloud storage service and open it from a web browser.
steps: Sign up for or sign into a cloud storage service on your device
Find the upload button and select one file from your device to upload
Wait for the upload to finish and check that the file appears in your cloud folder
On a different device or browser, sign into the same cloud storage account
Locate the uploaded file and open it to confirm you can access it
completionCriteria: A file from your device is now visible in your cloud storage
You successfully opened the file from a different device or browser
commonProblems: Upload fails because of a poor internet connection — try again on Wi-Fi
Cannot find the uploaded file — check the correct folder or use the search bar
Running out of free storage space — most services offer a limited amount for free
tips: Most smartphones come with some free cloud storage already set up — check your settings
Create folders with clear names to keep your cloud files organized from the start
Enable automatic photo backup so new pictures are saved to the cloud without extra steps
Remember your login credentials or save them in a password manager
